getClass, hashCode, notify, notifyAll, wait, wait, wait Constructor Detail Calibrate public Calibrate (java.awt.Frame parent, OrthoTweezersTools tools) Creates new modal Calibrate dialog box. When the user presses the Calibrate button, this runs

e user presses the Calibrate button, this runs an algorithm to set the parameters in tools.control(). The algorithm is run in a separate thread and the user can cancel. Parameters: parent - The parent Frame tools - The OrthoTweezersTools

- The parent Frame tools - The OrthoTweezersTools used to control the system. The underlying OrthoTweezersControl is obtained from this. Method Detail execute public void execute () throws CancelException This is call
